description: Request body to trigger a DB sync run (POST /v1/sync, sync_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). All fields are optional.

write.description: When false (default), compute sync diff without writing. When true, apply changes to the DB.

target.description: Optional target subsystem or file path to restrict the sync scope. When null, full sync runs.

force.description: When true, bypass incremental checks and force a full re-sync.
